purpose: A button that shows only an icon, no text. Used for compact action triggers when screen space is limited or actions are universally recognized.
whenToUse: In toolbars where space is constrained
For universally recognized actions (delete, edit, settings)
In ShellBar for global actions (notifications, help, account)
whenNotToUse: For primary actions — use Button with label
doRules: Use a tooltip explaining the action
Pair with a well-known icon metaphor
Keep touch area ≥32px even if icon is smaller
Use Transparent type as default; Emphasized only for emphasis
dontRules: Do not use IconButton for primary actions — use Button with label
Do not use unfamiliar custom icons
Do not make touch area smaller than 32×32px

contentRules: Tooltip describes action in verb form

responsiveBehavior.S: May grow to 44×44px for touch targets

exceptions: ShellIconButton variant has different styling for the application shell
